name: Rahu Transit over Natal Mars — Inflammation & Infection Activation
description: When Rahu transits over the natal Mars position, it amplifies Mars's inflammatory and surgical energy, creating a medium-term window for infections, inflammation flare-ups, and surgical necessity.

source_text.quote: When Rahu transits over the natal position of Mars, there will be danger from wounds, fire, and poison... inflammatory diseases and blood disorders.

all_of: Transit Rahu passes over or within 3 degrees of the natal Mars position

interpretation.meaning: Rahu amplifies whatever it contacts. Over natal Mars, it amplifies Mars's inflammatory, cutting, and blood-related energy. This creates a pronounced window for infections, inflammations requiring antibiotics, and conditions that may necessitate surgical drainage or intervention.

metadata.notes: One of the most reliable transit triggers for acute medical events. Rahu on Mars = amplified surgical energy.

name: Saturn Transit on Lagna Sphuta — Systemic Bodily Weakness
description: When Saturn transits over the exact Lagna degree (Lagna Sphuta), it creates a period of systemic weakness, lowered immunity, and vulnerability to chronic health breakdown.

source_text.quote: Saturn transiting over the Lagna degree brings bodily suffering, weakness of constitution, and diseases of a chronic nature.

all_of: Transit Saturn passes over or within 2 degrees of the natal Lagna Sphuta (Ascendant exact degree)

interpretation.meaning: Saturn on the Lagna Sphuta directly suppresses the body's vitality and immune response. The Lagna represents the physical body itself — Saturn's heavy, cold, restricting energy over this point creates systemic weakness and susceptibility to chronic conditions.

metadata.notes: Lagna Sphuta is the most sensitive health point. Saturn's transit here is a reliable indicator of health vulnerability windows.

name: Lagna Lord Transiting 6/8/12 — Self in Disease/Surgery/Hospital
description: When the lord of the Lagna transits through the 6th (disease), 8th (surgery), or 12th (hospitalization) house, the native's vitality is placed in houses of suffering.

source_text.quote: When the lord of the Ascendant transits through the 6th, 8th, or 12th houses, the native suffers from diseases, undergoes surgical procedures, or is confined to bed.

any_of: The natal Lagna lord transits through the 6th house
The natal Lagna lord transits through the 8th house
The natal Lagna lord transits through the 12th house

interpretation.meaning: The Lagna lord represents the self and physical vitality. When it transits through Dusthana houses (6/8/12), the native's life-force is temporarily placed in houses of disease, surgery, and confinement — activating medical vulnerability.

metadata.notes: Differentiates by house: 6th = disease onset, 8th = surgical intervention, 12th = hospitalization/confinement.

name: Mars Transit over 8th House — Surgical Window Activation
description: Mars transiting through the natal 8th house activates the house of surgery and creates a medium-term window where surgical interventions are most likely to occur.

source_text.quote: Mars transiting the 8th house brings danger of wounds from weapons, surgical operations, and blood loss.

all_of: Transit Mars passes through the natal 8th house

interpretation.meaning: Mars (planet of surgery, cuts, and blood) transiting the 8th house (house of surgery, transformation, and crisis) creates the most direct transit indicator for surgical intervention. The natural karaka activates its natural house.

metadata.notes: Mars spends approximately 45 days in each sign. Its 8th house transit creates a predictable surgical vulnerability window.

name: Saturn-Mars Mutual Aspect in Transit — Chronic Inflammation Flare
description: When Saturn and Mars form a mutual aspect in transit (opposition or square), it activates chronic inflammatory conditions and creates a window for disease aggravation.

source_text.quote: When Saturn and Mars aspect each other in transit, there will be diseases of an inflammatory yet chronic nature, affecting bones and blood simultaneously.

all_of: Transit Saturn and transit Mars form a mutual aspect (7th aspect opposition, or Saturn's 3rd/10th aspect on Mars, or Mars's 4th/8th aspect on Saturn)

interpretation.meaning: Saturn (chronic, cold, restrictive) and Mars (inflammatory, hot, acute) in mutual aspect create a paradoxical combination of chronic inflammation — conditions that are both persistent AND painful. This triggers autoimmune flares, bone infections, and chronic pain syndromes.

metadata.notes: Saturn-Mars combination is the classic 'chronic inflammation' signature. Seen in arthritis, chronic infections, and autoimmune conditions.

name: Rahu Transit over Natal 8th Lord — Crisis Amplification
description: When Rahu transits over the natal 8th lord's position, it amplifies the potential for sudden health crises, hidden diseases surfacing, and emergency medical situations.

source_text.quote: Rahu transiting over the lord of the 8th house amplifies danger to life, brings hidden diseases to the surface, and triggers emergency situations.

all_of: Transit Rahu passes over or within 3 degrees of the natal 8th lord's position

interpretation.meaning: Rahu amplifies the 8th lord's crisis-generating capacity. Hidden or dormant health issues suddenly surface, conditions that were manageable become emergencies, and the potential for sudden health crises increases dramatically.

metadata.notes: Rahu on the 8th lord often manifests as a health issue that was previously hidden or misdiagnosed suddenly becoming apparent and urgent.
